lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Shhh! I'm waiting for the show!

sections.title: When performing on stage during The Fremennik Trials

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: YOU ARE A TERRIBLE BARD!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Don't give up your day job outerlander!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: I thought somebody was murdering a cat!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: You know, I actually quite liked that verse...

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: That's kind of catchy. Irritating. But catchy.

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Hey, I've done that quest too!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: I have produced better sounds in the outhouse!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Your song makes no sense outerlander!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: What kind of bard are you anyway?

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: I have met cows more musical than you!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: When do you get to the good parts?

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: would torture us so, outerlander?

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Truly, this is the worst sound I have ever heard!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: looting and drinking part?

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Please tell me that was the last verse...

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Please... Kill me now...

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: You call THAT singing?

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Never before have mine ears been so offended!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Worst. Bard. EVER.

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Please, ye gods! Make it stop!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: If you stopped singing

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: The screams of my dying comrades sound better!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: My grandmother could do better, and she is dead!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: I do such feats before breakfast!

lines.speaker: Fridgeir
lines.text: Is your singing some kind of outerlander weapon?
